reason_for_decision: The article now frames low-altitude security as an end-to-end architecture with clearer response, governance, and validation logic, which lifts it above the pass threshold.
strengths: It now covers response integration and authority boundaries explicitly.
The interface and validation sections add real system-design value.
The article is much more operational than the previous sensor-led version.
summary_assessment: This version passes. It is now a proper architecture article rather than a short overview of layers.
